accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.heading: Run accounting without scattering the team
accounting.subtitle: Review, journal, periods, taxes, exports, and admin configuration now live in clear tabs.

dependencies.title: Source dependencies
dependencies.subtitle: Accounting reads trusted finance events from existing modules. Expenses stays the only hard dependency for activation.

next_steps.title: What comes after Phase 5
next_steps.subtitle: The accounting bridge now covers journal, taxes, exports, periods, reconciliation, and mobile supervision. The next slice focuses on demo and superadmin enablement.

mobile.title: Quick overview
mobile.subtitle: Keep the key accounting numbers and alerts in view before opening the detailed workspace.

alerts.title: Priority alerts
alerts.subtitle: Open the area that needs work directly without stretching the page.
alerts.empty: No priority alert is open for this scope.

pending_review.title: Pending review batches
pending_review.description: Accounting batches still need review before clean handoff.

open_periods.title: Periods still active
open_periods.description: One or more periods are still open, in review, or reopened.

tax_due.title: Tax position to verify
tax_due.description: A positive net tax due still needs supervision before filing.

tax_credit.title: Tax credit position
tax_credit.description: The selected scope currently shows a tax credit to verify.

export_missing.title: No accountant export yet
export_missing.description: This workspace has not generated an accounting handoff export yet.

review.title: Review workspace
review.subtitle: Work through pending accounting batches quickly before month-end handoff.
review.empty: All current accounting batches are reconciled for this scope.

taxes.title: Tax summary
taxes.subtitle: Review collected taxes, paid taxes, and the net position for the selected scope without leaving the journal.
taxes.review_required_title: Tax lines that still need review
taxes.review_required_subtitle: These tax-bearing sources still need accounting review before handoff or filing.

exports.title: Accountant handoff exports
exports.subtitle: Generate a reproducible CSV from the current accounting scope and keep a small audit trail of what was exported.
exports.empty: No accounting export has been generated yet.

periods.title: Accounting periods
periods.subtitle: Move a month through the accounting statuses while keeping closed periods protected from silent sync drift.

accounts.title: Chart of accounts foundation
accounts.subtitle: Review the accounts currently used by the accounting workspace.

mappings.title: Default mapping conventions
mappings.subtitle: Quickly verify how finance sources flow into accounting entries.

review.label: Review
review.subtitle: Handle priorities and batches that still need reconciliation.

journal.label: Journal
journal.subtitle: Filter and inspect entries without making the screen overly long.

periods.label: Periods, tax, and exports
periods.subtitle: Close periods, check tax, and prepare accountant handoff in one place.

configuration.label: Admin configuration
configuration.subtitle: Control finance rules, the chart of accounts, and mappings.

configuration.title: Admin configuration
configuration.subtitle: Centralize the accounting settings that matter here and open the existing admin surfaces quickly.
configuration.rule_subtitle: Review the active roles and thresholds for this document.

journal.title: Accounting journal
journal.subtitle: Review generated entries by period, source, account, and review status without leaving the module.
journal.empty: No accounting entries match these filters yet.

filters.search_placeholder: Search by source reference, account, or description

grouped.by_account_subtitle: See which accounts carry the filtered accounting volume.
grouped.by_source_subtitle: Check which operational domains are generating the current journal slice.
